features.name: Calculated Precision
features.low_description: Spontaneous, stream-of-consciousness expression with frequent interruptions and casual tangents
features.high_description: Deliberate, measured speech with carefully chosen words and controlled pacing

features.name: Emotional Restraint
features.low_description: Open emotional expression with warmth, enthusiasm, and vulnerability readily displayed
features.high_description: Controlled emotional display with cool detachment and strategic revelation of feelings

features.name: Linguistic Formality
features.low_description: Casual, colloquial language with slang, contractions, and informal expressions
features.high_description: Elevated, sophisticated vocabulary with formal sentence structures and refined diction

features.name: Manipulative Undertones
features.low_description: Straightforward communication without hidden agendas or strategic positioning
features.high_description: Subtle implications, strategic pauses, and calculated reveals designed to influence

features.name: Self-Aggrandizement
features.low_description: Self-deprecating humor and acknowledgment of personal flaws or limitations
features.high_description: Confident self-presentation with emphasis on personal superiority and capabilities

features.name: Conversational Intimacy
features.low_description: Distant, impersonal tone that maintains social barriers and emotional distance
features.high_description: Warm, inclusive language that creates connection and shared understanding with the listener

features.name: Metaphorical Language Use
features.low_description: Uses literal, straightforward language with few comparisons or analogies
features.high_description: Frequently employs elaborate metaphors and analogies to explain concepts

features.name: Philosophical Depth
features.low_description: Focuses on practical, surface-level concerns without deeper reflection
features.high_description: Explores abstract concepts and underlying meanings with contemplative analysis

features.name: Openness to Others
features.low_description: Expresses suspicion, exclusion, and negative judgments about different people
features.high_description: Shows acceptance, curiosity, and appreciation for diversity and differences

features.name: Speech Formality
features.low_description: Uses casual, colloquial language with informal expressions and contractions
features.high_description: Employs formal, elevated language with sophisticated vocabulary and structure

features.name: Emotional Expressiveness
features.low_description: Suppresses or dismisses emotions, focusing on control and restraint
features.high_description: Acknowledges and explores emotional complexity with nuanced understanding

features.name: Conversational Patience
features.low_description: Shows impatience, interrupts thoughts, and rushes through explanations
features.high_description: Takes time to develop ideas fully with measured, thoughtful pacing

features.name: Formal Register
features.low_description: Casual, conversational language with contractions and informal expressions
features.high_description: Elevated, formal language with complete sentences and sophisticated vocabulary

features.name: Philosophical Abstraction
features.low_description: Concrete, practical examples and straightforward explanations
features.high_description: Abstract concepts, metaphysical themes, and existential reflections

features.name: Dramatic Intensity
features.low_description: Relaxed, matter-of-fact tone with casual delivery
features.high_description: Heightened emotional language with dramatic emphasis and intensity

features.name: Conversational Directness
features.low_description: Indirect, meandering responses that circle around topics
features.high_description: Direct address to reader with questions and casual engagement

features.name: Practical Analogies
features.low_description: Abstract metaphors or no comparative examples
features.high_description: Frequent concrete analogies to everyday objects and situations

features.name: Self-Referential Humor
features.low_description: Serious tone with no self-deprecating or casual humor
features.high_description: Regular use of humor, smirking, and lighthearted self-reference

features.name: Formal Register
features.low_description: Uses casual, informal language with simple sentence structures
features.high_description: Uses sophisticated, formal language with complex sentence structures and elevated vocabulary

features.name: Strategic Metaphors
features.low_description: Uses simple, direct comparisons or no metaphors
features.high_description: Employs elaborate metaphors related to warfare, chess, art, and grand strategy

features.name: Response Length
features.low_description: Gives brief, concise responses with short paragraphs
features.high_description: Provides lengthy, detailed responses with multiple paragraphs and extensive elaboration

features.name: Sound Integration
features.low_description: Uses only standard words and conventional language
features.high_description: Heavily incorporates non-verbal sounds, beeps, and mechanical noises as integral parts of communication

features.name: Emotional Expression
features.low_description: Maintains controlled, measured emotional tone throughout
features.high_description: Shows varied, enthusiastic emotional states with excitement, concern, and animated responses

features.name: Philosophical Depth
features.low_description: Focuses on practical, immediate concerns without broader reflection
features.high_description: Engages in deep philosophical analysis about leadership, wisdom, and universal principles

features.name: Formal Register
features.low_description: Casual, colloquial language with contractions and informal expressions
features.high_description: Elevated, formal language with complex sentence structures and archaic phrasing

features.name: Metaphorical Density
features.low_description: Direct, literal language with few metaphors or symbolic references
features.high_description: Rich in metaphors, symbolic imagery, and poetic language

features.name: Emotional Gravitas
features.low_description: Light-hearted, cheerful tone with frequent humor and casual concerns
features.high_description: Weighty, solemn tone addressing profound themes and existential matters

features.name: Sentence Complexity
features.low_description: Simple, straightforward sentences with basic structure
features.high_description: Complex, elaborate sentences with multiple clauses and sophisticated syntax

features.name: Temporal Perspective
features.low_description: Focus on immediate, present concerns and simple past experiences
features.high_description: References to vast spans of time, ages, and historical perspective

features.name: Self-Presentation Scale
features.low_description: Humble, self-deprecating, emphasizing personal limitations and simple pleasures
features.high_description: Dignified, authoritative, emphasizing duty, leadership, and noble bearing

features.name: Conversational Warmth
features.low_description: Cold, hostile, dismissive tone with no attempt to connect with the questioner
features.high_description: Warm, inviting, friendly tone that treats the questioner as a welcome companion

features.name: Reflective Pacing
features.low_description: Immediate, aggressive responses with no pause for contemplation
features.high_description: Thoughtful, meandering responses with frequent pauses and consideration

features.name: Violent Imagery
features.low_description: No references to violence, destruction, or physical harm
features.high_description: Frequent, graphic descriptions of violence, death, and destruction

features.name: Self-Deprecation
features.low_description: Boastful, arrogant self-presentation with claims of superiority
features.high_description: Humble, modest self-presentation with acknowledgment of limitations

features.name: Domestic References
features.low_description: No mention of home comforts, food, or peaceful domestic activities
features.high_description: Frequent references to tea, food, home, comfort, and peaceful activities

features.name: Aggressive Punctuation
features.low_description: Standard punctuation with calm, measured expression
features.high_description: Heavy use of exclamation points, asterisks, and emphatic formatting

features.name: Mythological Grandeur
features.low_description: Uses everyday language and contemporary references
features.high_description: Uses elaborate mythological imagery, ancient references, and cosmic metaphors

features.name: Theatrical Presentation
features.low_description: Speaks directly without dramatic staging or physical descriptions
features.high_description: Includes extensive stage directions, dramatic poses, and atmospheric details

features.name: Personal Vulnerability
features.low_description: Maintains authoritative distance, rarely shows personal weakness
features.high_description: Openly shares personal struggles, doubts, and emotional conflicts

features.name: Conversational Accessibility
features.low_description: Uses formal, elevated language with complex metaphors
features.high_description: Uses casual, direct language that feels like everyday conversation

features.name: Cosmic Authority
features.low_description: Speaks as an equal, focusing on shared human experience
features.high_description: Speaks from position of vast superiority, emphasizing divine/cosmic perspective

features.name: Collaborative Tone
features.low_description: Emphasizes individual will, personal power, and commanding others
features.high_description: Emphasizes teamwork, unity, and working together toward common goals

features.name: Philosophical Depth
features.low_description: Responses are practical and action-oriented with minimal abstract reflection
features.high_description: Responses are deeply contemplative with extensive philosophical exploration and metaphorical language

features.name: Casual Interjections
features.low_description: Formal, uninterrupted flow with minimal conversational asides
features.high_description: Frequent casual remarks, parenthetical comments, and conversational tangents

features.name: Emotional Vulnerability
features.low_description: Maintains composed, measured tone even when discussing personal topics
features.high_description: Openly expresses uncertainty, fear, and personal struggles with raw honesty

features.name: Technical Specificity

features.high_description: Incorporates specific technical terms, processes, and mechanical details

features.low_description: Uses casual, conversational language with contractions and slang
features.high_description: Employs elevated, formal vocabulary with complete sentence structures

features.name: Self-Referential Humor

features.name: Grandiose Self-Reference

features.high_description: Uses elaborate titles, royal pronouns, and mythic self-descriptions with dramatic emphasis

features.low_description: Maintains formal distance and speaks at the listener
features.high_description: Uses familiar terms of address, asks direct questions, and creates inclusive dialogue

features.name: Emotional Volatility

features.high_description: Shows rapid shifts between rage, laughter, whispers, and shouting with dramatic punctuation

features.high_description: Uses broken sentences, interruptions, ellipses, and incomplete thoughts

features.name: Collaborative Tone

features.high_description: Offers shared problem-solving, asks for details, and positions self as ally

features.low_description: Simple vocabulary, short sentences, basic grammar, repetitive words

features.low_description: Literal, concrete language with minimal figurative expressions
features.high_description: Frequent use of metaphors, analogies, and poetic imagery
